summary: Rasterize a polygon into a coverage Mask under an explicit fill rule (nonzero winding / even-odd) with supersampled antialiasing; degenerate and self-touching edges produce finite coverage.

inputs.name: extent_from
inputs.doc: The resource whose pixel extent the produced mask matches.

params.name: points
params.doc: The polygon vertices as an array of [x, y] pixel coordinates, in path order (the closing edge from the last to the first vertex is implicit).

params.name: fill_rule
params.doc: The fill rule: `nonzero` winding (default) or `even-odd` parity.

perceptual.reason: polygon coverage is an exact supersampled count verified by analytic-area convergence, fill-rule, degenerate-edge, and rotation-covariance tests; there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
